Title: Drain
Description: Channels HP or Stamina into Mana over time. As a value, reads resource fill percentage.

target.Label: Target
target.Description: Entity to drain. Filter slot for Mana

destination.Label: Destination
destination.Description: Entity whose Mana will receive the drained resource. Defaults to caster. HP source is only allowed when draining self.

Next.Label: Next
Next.Description: The next glyph in the execution chain
